name: smart-edit
description: Improved edit tool for Pi Coding Agent — 4-tier matching (exact/indent/unicode/similarity), replaceAll, AST-anchored targeting, line-range scoping, semantic conflict detection, LSP diagnostics, multi-format input (search/replace, unified diff, OpenAI patch), stale-file guard, atomic writes, and mutation queuing

scripts.test: tsx --test test/hashline.test.ts && tsx --test test/formats.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/error-handling.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/read-cache.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/edit-diff.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/ast-resolver.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/ast-integration.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/conflict-detector.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/integration.test.ts && tsx --test ../../../test/lsp.test.ts
